final:
module deadbeat_controller(  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    input [3:0] in,  
    output reg [3:0] out  
);  

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin  
    if (rst)  
        out <= 4'b0000;  
    else  
        out <= in;  
end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
